description: You are the Financial Controller at Meridian Technology Group, a B2B SaaS company. The investor relations team submitted a Q3 2024 earnings presentation for your compliance sign-off before the earnings call. Your compliance review identified several critical failures. Correct the presentation at /home/ga/Documents/financial_report.pptx using the compliance requirements document at /home/ga/Desktop/meridian_compliance.txt. Save the corrected presentation to /home/ga/Documents/Q3_board_corrected.pptx without modifying the original file at /home/ga/Documents/financial_report.pptx.
